name: srm-biovault
description: SRM BioVault — Smart Hospital OPD Management System

scripts.validate:assistant:deploy: npm --prefix server run health:assistant:live && npm --prefix server run validate:assistant:multilingual
scripts.deploy:build: npm --prefix server ci && npm run validate:assistant:deploy && npm --prefix client ci && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.app:ios: cd client && npx cap open ios
